text.keepthatinventoryopen.disconnect.wa: You have items stored in the crafting grid or the mouse slot. These items will be thrown out of your inventory if you disconnect. Do you want to proceed?
tooltip.keepthatinventoryopen.onDisconne: Some servers may delete items stored in the crafting grid upon disconnecting.
tooltip.keepthatinventoryopen.displayWar: Display a warning if the crafting slots are occupied upon disconnecting.
